topic: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire)

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I wish I had more money. If only I had more money. I wish I were there. If only I had studied earlier. I wish I had not made this mistake.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I wish you would calm down. I wish I could fly. If only the weather were good. I wish I had talked to him. If only I had known this earlier.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा समय होता।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I wish I had more time.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "If only I has studied earlier."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If only I had studied earlier.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I wish I had not taken this decision. If only we could meet again. I wish I worked harder. If only he had forgiven me.
